assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command with Saturday 2-6 AM UTC maintenance window using FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows exact gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags for Saturday schedule

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides four quarterly exclusions (Q1-Q4) with approximately 21-day periods using --add-maintenance-exclusion commands

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Provides specific SOX audit exclusion for November 2024 with 30-day period and no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades or that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Stable release channel for SOX compliance and explains why it provides better control and stability

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags for all exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Mentions the 3 exclusion limit and 48-hour availability requirement, plus recommends planning manual upgrades for critical security patches during long exclusions
